blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.2 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,377 ft. Looking ahead, 30 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 5" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
